news.headline: Down 16% in a week, SOL sinks as BTC dominance rises. Texas to discuss BTC reserve, $200k BTC breakout predicted. ETH inflows surpass BTC. Ark forecasts $1.5m BTC by 2030. 21Shares XRP ETF filing, Hyperliquid launches mainnet. Pi interest peaks, HK firm doubles shares with 1 BTC purchase. Tether develops brain chip, Europe MiCA to close US policy gaps.
news.summary: Bitcoin's dominance in the crypto market has increased as Solana (SOL) experiences a 16% decline in value over the past week. Today, Texas plans to conduct a public hearing regarding Bitcoin reserves. Analyst Van Straten predicts an upcoming breakout for Bitcoin, foreseeing it reaching $200k by 2025, while Bernstein projects it to reach $1.5 million by 2030. In a noteworthy development, Ethereum ETF inflows surpassed those of Bitcoin in February. Additionally, MEMX exchange has applied to list the 21Shares XRP ETF. Sentiment surrounding SOL remains subdued due to concerns about LIBRA and tokens unlocking. DeFiTuna has exposed multiple individuals associated with LIBRA, prompting the departure of a co-founder of Meteora linked to the project. Jupiter announces an internal investigation related to LIBRA, causing a delay in JUP buybacks to gather community input. Hyperliquid has launched its EVM mainnet, and Pi Network's search interest has surged to a record high. A Hong Kong firm's shares doubled in value in a day following their acquisition of one Bitcoin. Tether is reportedly developing a brain chip similar to Neuralink. In other news, Monad is set to launch its testnet tomorrow, while Europe's MiCA initiative aims to address policy discrepancies with the US.

news.headline: IMA publishes Journal of Independent Medicine for unbiased medical research. Founded by FLCCC, new era begins. (Characters: 105)
news.summary: A new chapter in unbiased medical research has commenced with the launch of the Journal of Independent Medicine by the Independent Medical Alliance (IMA), previously known as FLCCC. This pioneering peer-reviewed publication represents a significant development in the field, aimed at upholding impartiality in medical research. Set to debut on February 18, 2025, in Washington, this journal marks a crucial step towards promoting transparency and credibility in the scientific community. Donning its new identity, the IMA strives to adhere to the highest standards in research and dissemination of medical knowledge. This initiative is poised to shape the future of medical research and aims to play a vital role in advancing healthcare practices.

news.headline: CenterPoint Energy gears up for extreme cold weather in Texas, monitoring forecasts and ensuring readiness for higher demand.ERCOT issues Weather Watch for Feb 19-21.
news.summary: A weather watch has been issued by ERCOT for February 19-21 due to anticipated extreme cold weather in its region. This is expected to lead to increased electrical demand and possibly lower reserves. CenterPoint is actively monitoring forecasts and conducting readiness checks on its electric and natural gas systems in preparation for this period.

news.headline: Royal Caribbean announces the launch of Legend of the Seas in July 2026, tripling world's best family vacation count.
news.summary: In an announcement made on February 18, 2025, in Miami, Royal Caribbean unveiled its latest innovation in cruising. The ship known as Legend of the Seas will redefine family vacations when it sets sail in July 2026. In a groundbreaking move, the cruise liner will triple the capacity of the world's best family vacation offerings. This initiative marks a significant milestone in the travel industry, with the ship promising an unparalleled experience for passengers. Royal Caribbean's new endeavor is set to raise the bar for family vacations, with a debut lineup that will cater to an unprecedented number of travelers seeking a memorable and exciting journey at sea.

news.headline: Dr. Terrence A. Gilbert, DO recognized as Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle for contributions as Leading Critical Care Physician.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on February 18, 2025, Terrence A. Gilbert, DO was recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for his work as a Leading Critical Care Physician in The Inner Circle. Dr. Gilbert, a highly respected critical care physician, has made significant contributions in the field.

news.headline: CoiniGo simplifies crypto payments for businesses with fast, scalable transactions globally. Instant, seamless solution for various industries.
news.summary: Businesses in today's rapidly evolving digital economy require smooth, efficient, and adaptable payment solutions to meet global demand. However, many struggle with sluggish transactions, exorbitant fees, and inflexible financial systems ill-suited for a cryptocurrency-driven environment. The demand for a borderless, real-time payment system is higher than ever, and CoiniGo is addressing this need. Beyond being just another crypto payment provider, CoiniGo serves as a cutting-edge transaction engine enabling businesses to instantly send, receive, and manage digital assets worldwide. CoiniGo offers a seamless crypto payment gateway designed for businesses of all sizes, including Forex, E-commerce, fintech, high-frequency trading, and global enterprises. In contrast to traditional solutions hampered by slow processing and operational constraints, CoiniGo ensures immediate transactions, dedicated wallet infrastructure, and a user-friendly experience. The platform has no minimum transaction limit and is detailed extensively on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Whirlpool Corp. to showcase new products at KBIS 2025. Major brands featured, event in Benton Harbor, Mich. Feb. 18.
news.summary: Whirlpool Corporation, a prominent global appliance company, will make a comeback to the Kitchen & Bath Industry Show in Benton Harbor, Michigan on February 18, 2025. The company plans to showcase new products and interactive experiences from four of its renowned brands.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls after U.S.-Russia talks, Warren Buffett buys stocks. Nvidia rises, Meta drops.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline as the Dow Jones fell following discussions between the U.S. and Russia. A stock favored by Warren Buffett displayed a notable increase. While Nvidia showed strong momentum, Meta faced a decline. This update provides live coverage of the current market trends without mentioning the specific source.

news.headline: Glider AI's Skills Validation Platform now on SAP Store, offers AI-enabled assessments & interviews to customers. Cupertinio, Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: Glider AI has recently revealed that their AI-powered Assessments and Interviews now work seamlessly with SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting and SAP SuccessFactors Learning platforms. This integration allows customers to access skills verification and expertise on a large scale. The announcement was made in Cupertino, California on February 18, 2025. Through this collaboration, Glider AI aims to provide effective skills validation to a wide range of clients.

news.headline: SEC's deadline extension poses a challenge to Coinbase as the cases against them and Binance are uncertain post Crypto Task Force creation.
news.summary: The regulatory inquiries into Coinbase and Binance are facing uncertainty with the establishment of the Crypto Task Force.

news.headline: Orocidin's QR-01 has good safety profile in preclinical toxicity study for aggressive periodontitis treatment. (Includes key details)
news.summary: Beverly Hills, CA - On Feb. 18, 2025, Orocidin A/S, a subsidiary of Nordicus Partners Corporation (OTCQB: NORD), specializing in aiding Nordic and U.S. life sciences firms in entering the U.S. market, finished its initial toxicity study for QR-01. QR-01 is an innovative therapy for aggressive periodontitis.

news.headline: Burgundy Diamond Mines forms diesel fuel offtake deal with Macquarie Bank subsidiary for enhanced operations.
news.summary: Burgundy Diamond Mines has recently finalized a groundbreaking deal with a branch of Macquarie Bank concerning the purchase of diesel fuel. This innovative agreement is set to enhance the operations of Burgundy Diamond Mines by providing a steady supply of fuel for their activities. This new partnership with Macquarie Bank's subsidiary marks a significant development for Burgundy Diamond Mines as they continue to strengthen their position in the market.

news.headline: RBC Capital Markets on UK Employment Data today

Global and regional Cannabinol industry market trends from 2019-2024 and forecast to 2029. Report covers general information, synonyms, chemical composition, safety, hazards, and transport details. A comprehensive study aiding in understanding the market.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on Cannabinol (CAS 521-35-7) industry research has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report covers global and regional market trends from 2019 to 2024 and forecasts up to 2029. It provides detailed insights on various aspects of Cannabinol including general information, synonyms, chemical composition, safety measures, hazards, handling procedures, storage requirements, as well as toxicological and ecological details. Additionally, the report includes transport information. This comprehensive study is a valuable resource for gaining understanding in the Cannabinol sector.

news.headline: Franchise consulting firm, The Perfect Franchise, aids entrepreneurs in finding ideal opportunities for success.
news.summary: A franchise consulting firm in SHOHOLA, Pa., announced on Feb. 18, 2025, that they specialize in assisting potential business owners in identifying suitable opportunities for sustained success. The company, known as The Perfect Franchise, provides franchise coaching, education, and expert brand matching services.

Nigeria plans to tax crypto transactions to boost revenue, expecting significant income from amended regulations.
news.summary: Nigeria is proposing changes to its regulations on digital assets to introduce taxes on cryptocurrency transactions. The country anticipates that this move will generate significant revenue.

news.headline: Nozomi Networks named a leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for CPS Protection Platforms, showing strong execution and vision.
news.summary: A company has been acknowledged for its strong performance in both execution and vision in San Francisco on February 18, 2025. Nozomi Networks, a prominent player in the security sector for operational technology (OT), Internet of Things (IoT), and Cyber-physical systems (CPS), was unveiled as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant report for CPS Protection Platforms. This recognition solidifies the company's position within the industry and underscores its commitment to providing top-notch security solutions.

news.headline: SPACs, or 'blank-check companies,' have returned with a surge in popularity. Stay wary of risks despite the $34 billion raised.
Ageas and BNP Paribas announce a transparency notification regarding their cooperation.
France convenes a second meeting to discuss Ukraine and European security on Wednesday, including NATO allies who were not invited on Monday - Three Diplomatic Sources.
Terra CO2 secures US$82M in Series B funding to advance sustainable cement technology, led by Generation Investment Management and Eagle Materials.
news.summary: In Golden, Colorado, Terra CO2 (Terra), a prominent low-carbon building materials company in the US, revealed that it secured Series B equity commitments totaling $82 million. The funding comes from a blend of financial and strategic investors, with key involvement from Just Climate (backed by Generation Investment Management), Eagle Materials (NYSE: EXP), and GenZero. Additionally, various industrial partners have shown interest, with official announcements expected soon. Previously, Breakthrough E was the lead investor in the Seed and Series A rounds for Terra CO2.

news.headline: Houzz and Figure partner to make HELOCs more accessible for homeowners' renovation projects. Important numbers: Figure is the nation's largest non-bank provider of HELOC, offering financing options for home remodels and design projects.
news.summary: A marketing partnership has been established between Houzz Inc., a leading home remodeling and design platform, and Figure Lending, LLC, the nation's largest non-bank provider of Home Equity Lines of Credit. The partnership aims to improve accessibility to financing for home renovation and design projects. This collaboration provides an integrated solution for homeowners and industry professionals, offering all-in-one project management and design software.

news.headline: Armis named a Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for CPS Protection Platforms, ensuring robust security for cyber-physical systems.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Armis, a company specializing in cyber exposure management and security, has recently been recognized as a leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for CPS Protection Platforms. Cyber-physical systems (CPS) are crucial as they bridge the physical and digital realms, impacting industries like infrastructure, transportation, healthcare, and smart manufacturing. The blending of IT, operational technology (OT), Internet of Things (IoT), and Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) in these environments intensifies security risks. Armis aims to provide robust security solutions to address these challenges.

news.headline: Global Food Certification Market expected to reach USD 9,632.7 Million by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 5.28%, with USD 5,760 Million in 2024. North America dominates the market, while Asia Pacific shows fastest growth.
news.summary: The global Food Certification Market was valued at USD 5,760 Million in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 6,045.5 Million in 2025, with an expected growth to approximately USD 9,632.7 Million by 2034, at a 5.28% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) from 2025 to 2034. Factors such as increasing awareness of food safety, traceability of ingredients, and growth in the food and beverages industry are driving market demand. Regions like North America dominate the market, with Asia Pacific expected to grow rapidly. The market is segmented by risk, type, application, category, end user, and region. ISO 22000 certification holds the highest market share. High costs, regulatory complexities, and lack of standards harmonization hinder market growth, while collaborations between manufacturers and certification issuers provide opportunities.

news.headline: US 6-Month Bill Auction
Hotel La Compañía del Valle in Panama opened first phase with 40 guestrooms, set to debut 30 more by May 2025 - a new Hyatt destination surrounded by biodiversity.
news.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H) and Shebandowan Holdings, S.A. have revealed the initial stage of the launch of Hotel La Compañía del Valle in Chicago. The hotel currently offers 40 guestrooms and suites, with another 30 rooms scheduled to open by May 2025. This new hotel in central Panama invites guests and World of Hyatt members to experience a unique setting enveloped by stunning biodiversity, mountains, and landscapes. As a part of The Unbound Collection by Hyatt, Hotel La Compañía del Valle is trailblazing a higher standard in accommodation experiences.

news.headline: The Solutions Project hosts 5th Black Climate Week from Feb 17-23, raising awareness of Black-led climate solutions.
news.summary: An award-winning initiative is highlighting the environmental and social advantages of Black-led climate solutions. Taking place in Oakland, California, from Feb. 17 to Feb. 23, The Solutions Project's 5th annual Black Climate Week aims to raise awareness. This event showcases the impact of Black leadership in tackling climate issues and promoting sustainability.

news.headline: AESOP Technology introduces first ML model to prevent Wrong-Site Surgery, reducing critical "Never Events."
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in San Francisco, an alarming issue of wrong-site surgeries (WSS) was highlighted as a critical "Never Event" in healthcare, where incidents like these should never happen. However, the actual frequency of WSS cases is uncertain due to underreporting, posing risks to patient safety and healthcare standards. The lack of accurate data about WSS incidents underscores the importance of addressing this issue promptly to safeguard patients.

news.headline: Claroty named leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for CPS Protection Platforms with top rankings in both Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision.
news.summary: Today, Claroty, a leading company in cyber-physical systems (CPS) protection, revealed that they have achieved the top position for Ability to Execute and the farthest position for Completeness of Vision. This recognition comes from the recent Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for CPS Protection. This marks an important milestone for Claroty as they continue to excel in the industry.

news.headline: Jollibee teams up with Botrista to launch signature beverages nationwide, highlighting the rise of automated solutions in the QSR industry.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in San Francisco, Jollibee Foods Corporation (JFC), a major player in the restaurant industry in Asia, made a significant move by partnering with Botrista. This partnership underscores the increasing significance of automated beverage solutions in the quick-service restaurant sector. This decision showcases JFC's recognition of the importance of integrating innovative technologies into their operations.

US and Russia to hold further discussions on Ukraine situation.
$AMZN Amazon shuts down it's Tiktok-like shopping feed - Information.
Dunhill Homes Announces Zero Down and Zero Due at Move-in Program on Select Inventory Homes
news.summary: In Dallas on February 18, 2025, Dunhill Homes, part of Winchester Carlisle Companies and a well-known homebuilder in Texas, revealed new initiatives aimed at increasing opportunities for homeownership. These programs aim to provide accessibility and affordability to potential buyers who meet the criteria.

news.headline: SVN International PBC is now the first employee-owned Public Benefit Corporation in commercial real estate, offering a 50-year plan for growth.
news.summary: In Boston on February 18, 2025, SVN® International PBC unveiled a 50-year plan tailored for high-growth entrepreneurs in the commercial real estate sector. As the top franchise for commercial real estate advisors in the U.S., SVN emphasizes its commitment to these entrepreneurs.

news.headline: Ukraine’s President Zelenskiy's postponed visit to Saudi Arabia is in order to not give legitimacy to the US-Russia meeting in Riyadh - Two Sources.
Elitek Vehicle Services, an LKQ company, unveils ADAS MAP in Plano, Texas, for advanced driver assistance systems.
news.summary: Elitek Vehicle Service, a subsidiary of LKQ, based in Plano, Texas, has recently introduced their cutting-edge ADAS MAP solution.

news.headline: KKR increases Enilive ownership to 30% with $614M investment, aiming to enhance Eni's capital structure and maintain control.
news.summary: Private equity firm KKR & Co. Inc. has agreed to acquire an additional 5% stake in Enilive from ENI S.p.A for 587.5 million euros (~$614.4 million), increasing its total ownership in the company to 30%. The investment, based on a post-money valuation of 11.75 billion euros for Enilive, aims to strengthen Eni's capital structure while allowing it to retain control and consolidation of the business. The deal is set to finalize next month and is part of KKR's strategy to enhance its presence in the market.

news.headline: TotalEnergies & Air Liquide partner for 2 hydrogen projects in Netherlands worth 600 million euros ($627.85 million), will cut CO2 emissions by up to 750,000 tons/year.
news.summary: TotalEnergies SE and L’Air Liquide SA have joined forces to launch two green hydrogen initiatives in the Netherlands, marking a combined investment of approximately 600 million euros ($627.85 million). The collaboration includes the creation of a 50/50 partnership to construct and manage a 250 MW electrolyzer close to the Zeeland refinery. Expected to be operational by 2029, this project aims to generate 30,000 tons of green hydrogen each year, leading to a potential reduction of 300,000 tons of CO2 emissions annually. These projects will be powered primarily by renewable energy sourced from the OranjeWind offshore wind farm, resulting in the production of 45,000 tons of green hydrogen annually and potentially cutting down CO2 emissions from refineries in Belgium and the Netherlands by up to 450,000 tons.

news.headline: FDA approves Sanofi's Merilog as first rapid-acting insulin biosimilar for diabetes, improving glycemic control.
news.summary: The FDA has approved Sanofi SA’s (NASDAQ:SNY) Merilog as a biosimilar to Novo Nordisk A/S‘ (NYSE:NVO) Novolog (insulin aspart) for managing glycemic levels in adults and pediatric diabetes patients. Merilog, a rapid-acting human insulin analog, is the initial rapid-acting insulin biosimilar sanctioned by the FDA. This insulin aids in reducing mealtime blood sugar spikes and enhancing blood sugar management. The approval applies to a 3 milliliter (mL) single-patient-use prefilled pen and a 10 milliliter (mL) multiple-dose vial. Merilog marks the third FDA-approved insulin biosimilar, following two long-acting versions greenlit in 2021.

news.headline: FDA approves GSK's 5-in-1 Meningococcal vaccine for adolescents aged 10-25 targeting 5 serogroups.(opcode: 97)
news.summary: GSK plc's Penmenvy has been authorized by the FDA for individuals between the ages of 10 to 25 years. The vaccine is designed to combat five key serogroups of Neisseria meningitidis (A, B, C, W, and Y) that are the common culprits behind invasive meningococcal disease (IMD). This new vaccine is a combination of the antigenic components from GSK's established products Bexsero (for Meningococcal Group B) and Menveo (for Meningococcal Groups A, C, Y, and W-135). Furthermore, GSK's recent Q4 earnings showcased a revenue and EPS beat, along with the initiation of a $2.5 billion stock buyback and an increase in the long-term annual sales forecast. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
